3275410.name: Puppet Project
3275410.description:
You find a strange puppet that clings to your arm and won’t let you escape. Now, you must find a way to free yourself while uncovering the secrets it hides and how it's connected to a powerful television channel.​

Investigate what they don’t want you to know

  • Solve puzzles and follow the hidden path left behind by Channel 7. Every clue brings you closer to uncovering the truth behind a twisted, abandoned puppet show.

Beware the environment

  • Immerse yourself in a handcrafted world, full of details that enrich the atmosphere. But remember: the environment is hostile and interactive, and every step could turn against you.

Meet the Puppet

  • You have no choice but to live alongside a sleeping puppet that will raise more questions than answers. It’s inevitable that you will get to know it, and what you uncover could change everything.

Can you uncover the truth before it's too late?
3275410.supported_languages:
西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*, 英语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
